scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every practical GET list/detail resource and dialect-expressible mutation on devices, variables, variable values (dots), device groups, device types, dashboards, and events. Excluded: organizations (multi-org/reseller-tier admin, requires an elevated org-scoped token most single-account callers never hold), users/tokens (account/auth introspection, not syncable domain data), UbiFunctions and Pages (serverless code/app deployment, not a data resource), plugins, synthetic variables, dashboard widget CRUD (UI layout, not data), and any bulk/range delete of variable values (destructive, irreversible mass-data-loss operation with no single-record-shaped equivalent this dialect can express safely).

excluded.reason: single-device detail; identical record shape to the devices list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
whole-object replace variant of the same device-update mutation; update_device's PATCH already covers the field-update shape this dialect can express
device-scoped multi-variable value write shortcut; create_variable_value already covers single-variable value injection, the per-record shape this dialect expresses
bulk multi-device delete by filter; far higher blast radius than the already-covered single-record delete_device and has no single-record request shape to express safely
single-variable detail; identical record shape to the variables list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-dot detail; identical record shape to the variable_values stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
permanently deletes a single stored data point; historical time-series data loss with no undo, excluded pending an explicit product decision to expose destructive per-dot deletes
bulk delete of an entire variable's value history (optionally range-scoped); irreversible mass time-series data loss, far higher blast radius than any covered write
device-group creation/membership-rule authoring is a UI/organizational-taxonomy operation, not a syncable data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
single-device-group detail; identical record shape to the device_groups list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
device-group membership-rule editing is a UI/organizational-taxonomy operation, not a syncable data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
whole-object replace variant of the same excluded device-group-update operation
deletes an organizational device grouping; low read value, out of scope for this pass's write surface
same device records the devices stream already returns, filtered to one group; not a distinct resource shape
device-type template authoring (icons/colors/default variables) is a UI-configuration operation, not a syncable data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
single-device-type detail; identical record shape to the device_types list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
device-type template editing is a UI-configuration operation, not a syncable data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
deletes a device-type template; low read value, out of scope for this pass's write surface
single-dashboard detail; identical record shape to the dashboards list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
dashboard creation configures a UI layout container, not a syncable data record; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
dashboard rename/layout editing is a UI-configuration operation, not a syncable data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
deletes a dashboard and its widget layout; low read value, out of scope for this pass's write surface
widget layout/visualization configuration, not underlying time-series data; the variable_values stream already covers the actual data those widgets render
single-event detail; identical record shape to the events list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
event/alert-rule authoring (trigger conditions, notification actions) is complex nested UI configuration, not a plain data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
event/alert-rule editing is complex nested UI configuration, not a plain data-record mutation; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
deletes an alert/event rule; low read value, out of scope for this pass's write surface
multi-organization/reseller-tier listing gated behind an org-scoped account plan most single-account API tokens never hold; not modeled by legacy and out of scope for this pass
same org-tier elevated-scope gating as the organizations list endpoint
account-user/membership introspection, not a syncable object stream
authenticated-account profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
API-token management/introspection, not application data; also a credential-adjacent surface out of scope regardless
UbiFunctions (serverless code deployment) is application/code management, not a data resource; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
custom dashboard Pages (app code/asset bundles) are a deployment artifact, not a syncable data resource; breadth-vs-cost triage for this pass
synthetic variables are returned by the same variables list endpoint (a variable type flag), already covered by the variables stream; not a distinct resource
